heading: Establishment of Office of the Police Corps and Law Enforcement Education
label: 12553 Establishment of Office of the Police Corps and Law Enforcement Education
text: There is established in the Department of Justice, under the general authority of the Attorney General, an Office of the Police Corps and Law Enforcement Education.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14093 of Title 42
